n: BG1 NPC in SoA: Water Gardens
no: Massive NPC pack bringing BG1 NPCs to BG2. Includes Water Gardens district, Kagain's Corner store, Coran & Safana, Alora, Faldorn, Xzar & Monty, Quayle & Tiax, Ajantis, Dynaheir, Kivan, Xan, Shar-Teel, Skie & Eldoth, Yeslick, Garrick, and more. Many components auto-skip when standalone NPC mods are detected.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Choose one Coran in BG2. Standalone Coran (by Domi/PPG) is more feature-rich with full romance and quest content. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Coran if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME O#Coran.cre, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Choose one Kivan in BG2. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Kivan if TDD's kivan10.cre detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME kivan10.cre. Fixed stale comp_b (removed unrelated Xzar/Monty reference), 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Choose one Kivan in BG2. Standalone Kivan of Shilmista is more feature-rich. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Kivan if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME p#kivan.cre, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: BG1NPCinSoA comp 50 auto-skips its Tiax when standalone Tiax detected (FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME O#Tiax.cre); installs Quayle only. Both can coexist.
conflicts.myComps: #50 Gnomes in the City: Quayle & Tiax
conflicts.source: BG1NPCSoA.tp2 line 9513: REQUIRE_PREDICATE with OR; line 9540: ACTION_IF NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME O#Tiax.cre, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Choose one Ajantis in BG2. Standalone Sir Ajantis (by jastey) is more feature-rich with full romance and quests. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Ajantis if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME c#ajan08.cre. Fixed stale comp_b (was 'Dynaheir' — wrong NPC, should be #60 Ajantis), 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Choose one Yeslick in BG2. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Yeslick if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME lk#yesl.cre. Fixed stale comp_b (removed unrelated Water Gardens reference), 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Choose one Skie in BG2 WeiDU auto-skips the bg1npcsoa version when standalone is detected.
Choose one Branwen in BG2. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Branwen if standalone detected.
conflicts.theirComps: #0 Branwen BG2 NPC mod for players and modders
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME o#bran.cre. Fixed stale comp_b (removed unrelated Water Gardens reference), 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Choose one Xan in BG2. Standalone Xan (by Kulyok) is vastly more feature-rich with full romance and personal quests. BG1NPCinSoA auto-skips its Xan if standalone detected.
conflicts.source: BG1NPCinSoA tp2 REQUIRE_PREDICATE NOT FILE_EXISTS_IN_GAME O#Xan09.cre, 2026-03

conflicts.reason: Choose one Quayle and Tiax in BG2 WeiDU auto-skips the bg1npcsoa version when standalone Quayle detected.
Choose one Faldorn in BG2. WeiDU auto-skips bg1npcsoa version when standalone detected.
Choose one Xzar/Montaron in BG2. WeiDU auto-skips bg1npcsoa version when standalone detected.
Choose one Dynaheir in BG2. WeiDU auto-skips bg1npcsoa version when standalone detected.

sum: Massive NPC pack bringing BG1 companions to BG2. Adds Water Gardens district, 15+ joinable NPCs (Shar-Teel, Yeslick, Garrick, Coran, Safana, Alora, Skie, Eldoth, Faldorn, Xzar, Montaron, Quayle, Tiax, Ajantis, Dynaheir, Kivan, Xan, Kagain, Branwen), kit changes, and expanded circus quest. Auto-skips NPCs when standalone mods detected.

co.n: Water Gardens. New Athkatla's district & new quests
co.tp2n: Water Gardens. New Athkatla's district & new quests

co.n: OPTIONAL component, NOT RECOMMENDED! Add unbalanced and non-lore items to merchant shops in Water Gardens?
co.no: OPTIONAL unbalanced non-lore items (not recommended).
co.tp2n: OPTIONAL component, NOT RECOMMENDED! Add unbalanced and non-lore items to merchant shops in Water Gardens?

co.no: REMOVED FROM ULTIMATE PRESET — standalone Yeslick NPC (i=143) is in the preset. BG1NPCSoA auto-skips via REQUIRE_PREDICATE when standalone Yeslick detected. Use one or the other.

co.tp2n: Brave Sir Garrick NPC in BG2 (SoA)

co.tp2n: ToB-part for Shar-Teel or/and Yeslick, Garrick, Branwen, Skie, Eldoth

co.no: REMOVED FROM ULTIMATE PRESET — standalone Branwen BG2 NPC (i=456) is more feature-rich with full romance, quests, Bodhi abduction, and ToB content. BG1NPCSoA auto-skips via REQUIRE_PREDICATE when standalone Branwen detected.
Adds Coran and Safana as joinable NPCs with a shared questline.
Alora joinable in SoA and ToB.

co.no: Kagain's Corner: store with many magical items.

co.no: Kagain's Corner: store with vanilla items only.

Dynaheir joinable in SoA.
Adds Kivan as a joinable NPC in BG2. Hard conflict with Kivan of Shilmista mod.

co.n: ToB-part for Shar-Teel or/and Yeslick, Garrick, Branwen, Skie, Eldoth
co.no: INSTALLS WITH WARNINGS: EET_NPC_TRANSITION reports 7XCRE2/4/5/6.cre don't exist — CRE files for some NPCs not found. BG2/ToB NPC functionality unaffected; BG1→BG2 transitions for these NPCs may not trigger.
Inter-component banter pack for BG1NPCSoA NPCs.

advisories.reason: BG1NPCSoA cn:2 adds Shar-Teel to BG2 as Nightbringer of Shar. k9SharteelNPC adds her to SoD. Both can coexist (different campaigns) but may have continuity inconsistencies.
